title: Docker Security Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on securing Docker containers and images.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is 'Docker Security' primarily used for?
options: Correctly securing your project's containers and their underlying infrastructure against vulnerabilities and unauthorized access

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a Docker-security-based workflow for a project?
options: Using only official and verified Docker images, and scanning them for security vulnerabilities before a production run
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
